scene.message: Male Student: Hnngh~? What's{nl} with this music~?!{waitkey}{ret}
Male Student: This shop just{nl} kills the tension, man.{waitkey}And it's rough outside, too.{waitkey}{ret}
Shopkeeper: My, it's cold{nl} out there~{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Where did this shop{nl} even spring up from?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Eee! A frog!!{waitkey}{clearbox}So pretty~{color:3}♥♥{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I want this frog~{nl} Papa, buy it, buy it~{color:3}♥{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Why a pharmacy...?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Is this a legitimate{nl} shop?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Hanajin Z... looks{nl} like it'd work like crazy.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Isn't there any proper{nl} medicine for everyday life?{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Muscle Drinko"!{waitkey}{clearbox}Muscle Drinko —{nl} the essence of a frog's love.{waitkey}A syllable over.{waitkey}{ret}
